channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Photos: Qatari Father Emir Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani
item.description: Sheikh Hamad, who ruled Qatar from 1995 to 2013 and stepped aside to make his son Sheikh Tamim emir, dies aged 74.

item.title: The spectacle and symbolism of Khamenei’s funeral
item.description: How coverage of the supreme leader's funeral exposed the limits of familiar narratives about Iran.

item.title: Former Emir of Qatar Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani dies: Reactions
item.description: After Sheikh Hamad's death, global leaders offer condolences, praise his legacy and Qatar’s growth.

item.title: Iran attacks five Gulf nations, shuts Hormuz after US bombing: All to know
item.description: Tehran hits back at several GCC countries, following the most intense US bombing since an MoU was signed last month.

item.title: Watch World Cup: England beats Norway to set up semifinal against Argentina
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: US CENTCOM completes third round of strikes on Iran
item.description: US CENTCOM completes third round of strikes on Iran

item.title: Missiles and drones fired at Gulf states after night of US strikes on Iran
item.description: Three people injured by falling shrapnel in Qatar as attacks also reported in UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman and Jordan.

item.title: France vs Spain World Cup semifinal: Prediction, Mbappe-Yamal, venue, stats
item.description: European football titans France and Spain meet in a blockbuster FIFA World Cup 2026 final four matchup in Dallas.

item.title: IRGC vows ‘crushing response’ to any further US attacks
item.description: IRGC vows ‘crushing response’ to any further US attacks

item.title: Lindsey Graham, one of Israel’s strongest US Senate allies, dies at 71
item.description: The US Republican senator died of a sudden illness, his office said. He was 71.

item.title: Ghana slavery apology: Why many descendants say words are not enough
item.description: Descendants of enslaved Africans say symbolic apologies cannot repair generations of loss and injustice.

item.title: Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani, architect of modern Qatar
item.description: The Father Emir oversaw the meteoric rise of the small gas-rich nation.

item.title: Former Emir of Qatar Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani dies aged 74
item.description: Sheikh Hamad, who ruled Qatar from 1995 to 2013, was a key architect of the energy-rich Gulf country's development.

item.title: US forces launch new strikes on Iran; Tehran closes Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US forces have launched a third round of strikes on Iran in a week.

item.title: Why doesn’t Indian PM Modi hold unscripted press conferences?
item.description: Why doesn't Indian PM Modi hold unscripted press conferences?

item.title: Iran launches attacks across the Gulf after more US strikes
item.description: Iran says it launched missile attacks on US military sites in Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan and Qatar.

item.title: What was the mistaken identity red card shown in Argentina vs Switzerland?
item.description: Switzerland's Breel Embolo became the first player to be sent off after a VAR review in the last World Cup quarterfinal.

item.title: Which teams are in the World Cup semifinals, and what’s the match schedule?
item.description: Qualified teams, venues, kickoff times, key players, and how to watch the FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinals.

item.title: McGregor injures knee, loses to Holloway in 69 seconds on UFC return
item.description: The referee stopped the welterweight contest at UFC 329 after McGregor fell to the mat three times in the first minute.

item.title: Argentina beats Switzerland to set up World Cup 2026 semifinal with England
item.description: Argentina need extra time to beat Switzerland 3-1 in the quarterfinals to set up a showdown with England on Wednesday.

item.title: England fans revel in World Cup win over Norway
item.description: Fans celebrated at a London watch party after England's 2-1 extra-time win over Norway in the World Cup quarter-finals.

item.title: Nigeria rescues dozens of abducted school children in Oyo state
item.description: Nigerian security forces have rescued 39 schoolchildren and five teachers abducted nearly two months ago in Oyo state.

item.title: Mediators push US-Iran talks in Qatar and Oman to avert escalation
item.description: Regional mediators are stepping up efforts to prevent further escalation between Iran and the US.

item.title: Bellingham scores twice as England beat Norway 2-1 to reach World Cup semis
item.description: Jude Bellingham scores in extra-time to send England into the World Cup semifinals for first time since 2018.

item.title: Iran war live: Middle East on high alert as IRGC, US military trade blows
item.description: Fears grow of further US-Iran escalation after largest tit-for-tat attacks yet during the ceasefire.
